case_title: NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC VS. MICHAEL TZE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC SERVED JUN-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TZE, MICHAEL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT & DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TZE, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-17-2013
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $299.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $900.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TZE, MICHAEL
DECLARATION UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL INTRUMENT; COMPUTATION OF INTEREST; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 (B) (2) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TZE, MICHAEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONAL CREDIT ADJUSTERS, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TZE, MICHAEL $3,988.41 PRINCIPAL, $808.25 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,796.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
